dsl_rule.translation_notes: Selling climax modeled as high volume spike with large lower wick relative to body. Volatility compression detected via Donchian bands narrowing (implicit in dc_upper/dc_lower usage). Breakout above consolidation high using dc_upper on closing basis. Volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20. Exit on close below consolidation low (dc_lower). Resistance levels would require external pivot data or prior price highs not available in standard indicators.

backtest_rule.reason: Selling climax modeled as high volume spike with large lower wick relative to body. Volatility compression detected via Donchian bands narrowing (implicit in dc_upper/dc_lower usage). Breakout above consolidation high using dc_upper on closing basis. Volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20. Exit on close below consolidation low (dc_lower). Resistance levels would require external pivot data or prior price highs not available in standard indicators.

source_rule_text: A trader should initiate a long entry on a breakout following a selling climax and subsequent volatility compression, as the stock is primed for a directional move.
